---
title: "Calibration of Stochastic Epidemiological Models"
subtitle: ""
author: "Presenter: Arindam Fadikar"
affiliation: "Decision and Infrastructure Sciences"
institute: "Argonne National Laboratory"
date: today
date-format: long
bibliography: refs.bib
title-slide-attributes:
  data-background-image: ""
  data-background-size: cover
  data-background-opacity: "0.25"
format:
  revealjs:
    margin: 0.15
    smaller: true
    code-fold: false
    code-overflow: scroll
    self-contained: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  cache: false
---

## Introduction

Replace this with your first slide content.

## R Code Example

```{r}
#| label: example
summary(cars)
```

## References
